ATL.note: Hard-capped at first apron; young core (Johnson, Daniels, Risacher); limited flexibility for major trades.

BOS.note: Tatum returns healthy; hard-capped at first apron; high salaries for Tatum/George limit flexibility.

BKN.note: Young core, significant cap flexibility, multiple draft picks, likely buyers at trade deadline.

CHA.note: Young core (Ball, Miller); hard-capped at first apron; tradable contracts; potential buyer.

CHI.note: Young core (Giddey, Williams, Buzelis); hard-capped at first apron; some cap space remains.

CLE.note: Capped out with core four; Harden's player option; potential trades for Strus/Schroder.

DET.note: Young core (Cunningham, Thompson, Duren); significant cap flexibility; potential buyer.

IND.note: Haliburton returns healthy; young team with potential to improve; cautious spending.

MIA.note: Giannis/Adebayo core; hard-capped at first apron; limited flexibility; over luxury tax.

MIL.note: Retooling after Giannis trade; significant dead cap (Lillard); acquired young talent (Herro, Jaquez Jr.).

NYK.note: Championship core; strict second apron limits; very limited flexibility; over luxury tax.

ORL.note: Strong young core; over first apron; very limited flexibility; banking on internal improvement.

PHI.note: Embiid/Brown/Maxey core; over luxury tax, near first apron; very limited flexibility.

TOR.note: Hard-capped at first apron; Barnes/Leonard core; limited flexibility; near luxury tax.

WAS.note: #1 pick Dybantsa; Young/Davis core; Davis injury concern; hard-capped at second apron.

DAL.note: Anthony Davis (injury-prone); severe cap issues; deep into luxury tax; limited flexibility.

DEN.note: Deep into repeater tax; Jokic/Murray core; likely salary dump trades (Johnson, Braun).

GSW.note: Aging core; Butler/Moody injuries; likely hard-capped at second apron; limited flexibility.

HOU.note: Hard-capped at second apron; young core with Durant; injury concerns (Durant, VanVleet, Adams).

LAC.note: Hard-capped at first apron; Kawhi Leonard; acquired Garland/Mathurin; seeking youth/dynamism.

LAL.note: Luka Doncic era; significant cap space; built around Doncic with new additions; buyer.

MEM.note: Significant cap space; large trade exception; crowded roster needs thinning; potential buyer.

MIN.note: Edwards/Ball core; hard-capped at second apron; DiVincenzo injury; limited flexibility.

NOP.note: Zion Williamson; need roster changes; Jordan Poole's bad contract; potential buyer.

OKC.note: Elite young core; deep into second apron; likely sellers (Hartenstein, Dort, Caruso).

PHX.note: Booker core; some flexibility to stay under first apron; significant dead money (Beal).

POR.note: Young core with Morant; cap flexibility; potential for significant trades; Lillard's contract.

SAC.note: Hard-capped at first apron; core of LaVine/Sabonis; over luxury tax; needs depth.

SAS.note: Deep young core (Wemby, Castle, Harper); hard-capped at first apron; good flexibility.

UTA.note: Young core with stars; hard-capped at first apron; good flexibility; potential buyer.
